content.en:
Subduing the skeleton that exists in the Origin Upper Realm, even if the opponent's strength is very weak, it is not something that ordinary Origin Realm can subdue.

Therefore, it is necessary for the Lord of Chaos to take action.

Rumble!!!!!

The Lord of Chaos enters the seal.

Soon, a big war began!

The skeleton defense existing in the Origin Upper Realm was almost invincible, but the combat effectiveness was still not good, and under the siege of the Lord of Chaos and other Origin Realms, it was quickly wiped out of the new consciousness and completely turned into a corpse.

That's it.

The Lord of Chaos succeeded in taking the skeleton away.

Subsequently.

A Origin Realm can come to comprehend this skeleton.

But after a period of time, many Origin Realms find that the skeleton of enlightenment is meaningless.

They themselves don't have much understanding of the golden body transformation on the other side, and this skeleton is very special, containing the origin rules of the other side.

They are not geniuses of the other side, so it will be very difficult to forcibly comprehend the mysteries on this skeleton.

Moreover, even if they realized it, it would be of no use to them, and could only be of great help to their forces.

Therefore, some Origin Realm enhancements may have a better effect if the other side level geniuses in their forces come to comprehend.

Even if you can't comprehend the complete method of the golden body on the other side from it, it is good to be able to comprehend some more golden texts and black texts on the other side!

And this proposal was approved by most of the Origin Realm.

So, they went to inform the other side of the genius.

......

Guheng Mountain.

The Lord of Eternal Zero came to find Ye Tian.

"Lord of Endless, there is a chance, you should go. "

The Lord of Eternal Zero.

"What chance?" Ye Tian asked.

At this time, the Lord of Eternal Zero said about the Origin Upper Realm Skeleton.

After Ye Tian heard this, he was immediately surprised, and he was immediately very moved.

If it weren't for this opportunity, this kind of opportunity would not have been his turn at all.

Of course.

If you can't realize it, then it's not a chance, it can only be said to be a waste of time.

Subsequently.

The Lord of Eternal Zero took Ye Tian to the Taichao Domain.

That skeleton was placed in the Chaos Domain.

After all, this time, it was the power of the Lord of Chaos that could easily wipe out the Origin Upper Realm.

Therefore, it is naturally very reasonable for this skeleton to be placed in the Taichao Domain.

Soon.

Ye Tian came to the Taichao Domain.

The Chaos Domain, in a time and space.

A golden skeleton was lying here, although its aura was suppressed, even the wisps of aura that emanated made it difficult for a seventh-level bone transformation genius like Ye Tian to move quickly, and could only move slowly.

"What a terrifying breath, this is the skeleton that exists in the Origin Upper Realm, even if it falls and is sealed, it is so terrifying!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

At this time.

There were a lot of other shore-level geniuses here, as well as a small number of Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors, who were all contemplating.

And Ye Tian stayed in a small void opened up nearby, sat cross-legged, and began to comprehend this skeleton of the Origin Upper Realm.

As soon as he came to his senses, he was obsessed with it.

"It's too mysterious!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Just a skeleton contains many mysteries and everything.

It is too difficult to comprehend the true method of the complete golden body of the other side from this skeleton, but there is still hope for understanding some more golden texts from the other side.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian tried his best to comprehend this skeleton, and strived to comprehend a little more.

Of course.

If you comprehend more golden inscriptions on the other side, you must engrave them and hand them over to Gu Heng Mountain.

Otherwise, Gu Hengshan would not have let him come to comprehend this skeleton!

One primeval epoch after another has passed.

Ye Tianshen realized one after another Golden Scripts and Upper Texts, but he didn't realize the method of completing the Golden Body on the Other Side, and he didn't even have a clue.

He knew very well that the reason why he didn't have a clue was that he didn't have enough golden scripts and black scripts on the other side that he had now.

If you have mastered enough Golden Script and Haven on the other side, you may be able to understand it.

Thereupon.

In the years that followed, he became obsessed with mastering more of the Golden Script and the Haven of the Other Side.

For him, mastering the method of completing the golden body on the other side is not the most important thing, but mastering more golden scripts and black scripts on the other side is the most important thing.

It is difficult for others to grasp too much of the Golden Script and the Haven of the Other Side, and it becomes more and more difficult to comprehend it when they come to the end.

But Ye Tian is still better, although it will be more difficult, but at least he can still quickly comprehend it.

This has something to do with the fact that he has a large number of primeval-level ancestral endowments, which has made his foundation potential reach an incredible level, so he can quickly comprehend the golden scripts on the other side and the black text on the other side.

So.

Ye Tian will become so demonic.

And other other shore-level geniuses, no matter how demonic they are, they can't grasp the golden scripts of the other side as quickly as he does.

Before you know it, 10,000 primeval years have passed.

And Ye Tian has been contemplating the golden skeleton and mastering more and more golden texts and black texts on the other side.

Of course, his cultivation in other aspects did not fall behind.

For example, his cultivation, with the help of the source stone on the other side, is now very close to the eighth bone transformation realm.

In addition, sixty percent of his body has now completed the golden body transformation on the other side, which is also a huge breakthrough.

And.

He is also about to create a very top-notch Beyond Divine Power Technique, which will be used to break through the bottleneck of the Eight Bone Transformation Realm in the future.

this day.

Ye Tian had mastered enough of the Golden Scripts on the Other Side and the Black Scripts on the Other Side, and when he went to comprehend the skeleton and comprehend the method of completing the Golden Body on the Other Side, he suddenly understood some.

However, he only understood a little.

If you don't understand it at the beginning, you won't understand it even more later.

Thereupon.

In order to understand this mystery, he used his replica body to test the experiment, so as to understand the mystery of comprehending the complete version of the Golden Body of the Other Side.

One primeval epoch after another passed.

In order to try to study, Ye Tian lost copying his body again and again, and gradually understood this mystery.

After understanding and understanding, we can see more mysteries.

Later, he continued to research, and he was able to see even more.

Finally, the long years passed.

Ye Tian gradually comprehended the complete version of the method of the golden body on the other side.

"The golden body on the other side of Xuanyang!"

This is the name of the Golden Body of the Other Side.

After Ye Tian comprehended, he obtained the relevant information.

In short, he can now cultivate the golden body on the other side of Xuanyang, and he doesn't need to create the method of the golden body on the other side of the river one by one.

And if you want to cultivate the golden body on the other side of Xuanyang, you must first cultivate the heart of the other side, and without the heart of the other side, you can't cultivate the golden body on the other side of Xuanyang.
